welcome:
👋 Welcome to *MOYOTECH Solutions*!

 Below is the list of our services. Pick one of your interest:
service_not_available: Sorry, that service is no longer available. Let me show you our current services.
generic_error: Sorry, something went wrong while processing your message. Please try again later.
no_services: Sorry, no services are currently available. Please contact us directly.
select_service_footer: We're here to help you grow
rate_limit_error: 🔄 We're experiencing high demand right now. Please try again in a moment or type 'menu' to see our services.
connection_error: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment!
auth_success_info: You can now use the sync services endpoint.
auth_failure_info: There was an error during authentication.
